query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_stocks,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ytdStartPrice IS NOT NULL AND ytdStartPrice > 0 THEN 1 END) as with_ytd_start,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ytdPerformance IS NOT NULL AND ytdPerformance != 0 THEN 1 END) as with_ytd_perf
FROM stocks;
command:

  COUNT(*) as total_stocks,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ytdStartPrice IS NOT NULL AND ytdStartPrice > 0 THEN 1 END) as with_ytd_start,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ytdPerformance IS NOT NULL AND ytdPerformance != 0 THEN 1 END) as with_ytd_perf
FROM stocks;
